stemHtml: Which of the following sets of conditions are most likely to lead to the formation of advection fog?

options.a: Cold maritime air flowing over a warmer land surface at a speed greater than 15 kt
options.b: Clear skies at night over an inland marshy area
options.c: A mild moist airstream flowing over colder surfaces with the wind speed less than 15 kt
options.d: A mild moist airstream flowing over colder surfaces with a wind in excess of 30 kt
